center.name: 里萨拉尔达省
center.summary: 里萨拉尔达省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Andean guan、Fulvous-breasted flatbill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: For example, it can be found in the Cocora valley in Quindío Department and the Quimbaya protected forest in Risaralda Department of Colombia, and the Yanacocha Reserve of Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fulvous-breasted flatbill (Rhynchocyclus fulvipectus) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela.Remsen, J
